title: Average Dependencies Distribution Bar Chart
description: Interactive Chart.js visualization for average dependencies distribution bar chart
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
chart.js
learningObjectives: Interpret a histogram of prerequisite counts per concept to assess the dependency structure of a 200-concept learning graph
Identify the optimal 2-4 prerequisite range highlighted in green and the dashed average line at 3.1 dependencies per concept
Compare the mean (3.1), median (2), and mode (2) prerequisite counts to characterize the skew of the distribution
Evaluate a learning graph's health using red flags such as a flat distribution, more than 15 percent zero-prerequisite concepts, or more than 10 percent of concepts with 6 or more prerequisites
